ticket.subject: Error in US invoices with PostNord
ticket.raw_subject: Error in US invoices with PostNord
ticket.description:
The amount I pay In custom taxes is based on subtotal and not on Grand
total as it should be.
Please help me resolve this issue asap!


So this a case for example:


1, Customer with order number 406449 and tracking code LA102174925SE have
paid 113.96 USD for the products.
[image: image.png]
[image: image.png]



2, I created a label with PostNord in multicarrier app.
[image: image.png]



3, I get the invoice from PostNord and notice that the orders looks too
big. I found out that multicarrier makes the custom invoice with the
Subtotal amount instead of the Grand total amount that is the correct
amount to pay custom fees on.
[image: att.U6WBBGZH3iIK4oKGpKDq7Zu1v-ORwMRpWuzdJEjXMPo.jpeg]



Vänliga hälsningar
Sofie Bitling
image.png
image.png
att.U6WBBGZH3iIK4oKGpKDq7Zu1v-ORwMRpWuzdJEjXMPo.jpeg
image.png

comments.body:
The amount I pay In custom taxes is based on subtotal and not on Grand total as it should be.

Please help me resolve this issue asap!





So this a case for example:





1, Customer with order number 406449 and tracking code LA102174925SE have paid 113.96 USD for the products.

 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/PwlJM6jQMHOa4WictaSmDlMSs/?name=image.png)

 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/Zwbz5C3tIVrHNaxkdhkDYS9Lt/?name=image.png)







2, I created a label with PostNord in multicarrier app.

 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/hlg6E2A8qLQEcLuaTqt8jOhiE/?name=image.png)







3, I get the invoice from PostNord and notice that the orders looks too big. I found out that multicarrier makes the custom invoice with the Subtotal amount instead of the Grand total amount that is the correct amount to pay custom fees on.

 ![att.U6WBBGZH3iIK4oKGpKDq7Zu1v-ORwMRpWuzdJEjXMPo.jpeg](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/EwKbpSfRuoV2jeMuqoHDEYmTR/?name=att.U6WBBGZH3iIK4oKGpKDq7Zu1v-ORwMRpWuzdJEjXMPo.jpeg)






Vänliga hälsningar

Sofie Bitling
comments.html_body:
The amount I pay In custom taxes is based on subtotal and not on Grand total as it should be.
Please help me resolve this issue asap!


So this a case for example:


1, Customer with order number 406449 and tracking code LA102174925SE have paid 113.96 USD for the products.





2, I created a label with PostNord in multicarrier app.




3, I get the invoice from PostNord and notice that the orders looks too big. I found out that multicarrier makes the custom invoice with the Subtotal amount instead of the Grand total amount that is the correct amount to pay custom fees on.



Vänliga hälsningar
Sofie Bitling
comments.plain_body:
The amount I pay In custom taxes is based on subtotal and not on Grand total as it should be.  Please help me resolve this issue asap!  
  
  So this a case for example:  
  
  1, Customer with order number 406449 and tracking code LA102174925SE have paid 113.96 USD for the products.  
  
  
  
  
  2, I created a label with PostNord in multicarrier app.  
  
  
  
  3, I get the invoice from PostNord and notice that the orders looks too big. I found out that multicarrier makes the custom invoice with the Subtotal amount instead of the Grand total amount that is the correct amount to pay custom fees on.       
  
  
Vänliga hälsningar  Sofie Bitling

comments.body:
Hello Sofie Bitling,

We would like to review this case in detail to better understand the situation.

To proceed, could you please provide temporary store access along with the login URL? This will allow us to check how the product prices are reflected in the orders and within the app’s packaging settings. We will also review the general configuration to identify what might be causing this behavior.

This will help us analyze the setup thoroughly and guide you with the required adjustments.

Looking forward to your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Sofie Bitling,
 
We would like to review this case in detail to better understand the situation.
 
To proceed, could you please provide temporary store access along with the login URL? This will allow us to check how the product prices are reflected in the orders and within the app’s packaging settings. We will also review the general configuration to identify what might be causing this behavior.
 
This will help us analyze the setup thoroughly and guide you with the required adjustments.
 
Looking forward to your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Sofie,

Thank you for providing the access.

However, I could observe that the order is selected with the price of $113.96 and also it is in processing status.

Could you please try generating the label for the above order and share the screenshot of the invoice so we can check from our end?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Regards,

Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Call summary: Customer has 2 queries :

1. Customer is unable to subscribe for plans , It's showing a blank page .  (Raising l3 for this)
2. Customer mentioned that for orders shipped from Sweden to the US, when a discount is applied, the value printed on the CN22 customs form shows the total product value without the discount applied. For example, in Order No. 409569, the amount displayed reflects the full price instead of the discounted price. The customer expects the discounted value to be shown so that customs duties are calculated based on the actual amount paid.

Recording: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1O66Db_zhVTPKO-WaNfidAHml8rE8Q5_c?usp=sharing
comments.html_body:
Call summary: Customer has 2 queries : 
  1. Customer is unable to subscribe for plans , It's showing a blank page .  (Raising l3 for this)
  2. Customer mentioned that for orders shipped from Sweden to the US, when a discount is applied, the value printed on the CN22 customs form shows the total product value without the discount applied. For example, in Order No. 409569, the amount displayed reflects the full price instead of the discounted price. The customer expects the discounted value to be shown so that customs duties are calculated based on the actual amount paid.
 
Recording: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1O66Db_zhVTPKO-WaNfidAHml8rE8Q5_c?usp=sharing

comments.body:
Need to raise L3 once we get confirmation from customer on:

She needs to try and pay from different browser (chrome / safari) Once the payment is resolved, we need to ask her test order for us to check. We have the backend access.


Query 1: Customer has contacted us again stating that she is unable to subscribe to the plans, as it is displaying a blank page. The subscription ended on Feb 20 2026, they have not been able to renew. The payment subscription ID page is blank. Customer was on $49 monthly plan


Query 2: Customer mentioned that for orders shipped from Sweden to the US, when a discount is applied, the value printed on the CN22 customs form shows the total product value without the discount applied. For example, in Order No. 409569, the amount displayed reflects the full price instead of the discounted price. The customer expects the discounted value to be shown so that customs duties are calculated based on the actual amount paid.

The subtotal $58.75 and Grand total is $47 with discount applied, However the subtotal is printed on the form. Screenshots are attached.


URL - https://store-e639qazpfv.mybigcommerce.com
Account ID - eb5b4aa6-2e50-4429-8171-688c8c2e81d0

Credentials :
email: support@pluginhive.com
RL for logging in is the following, and store name is "CNS Watch Bands"
https://login.bigcommerce.com/
comments.html_body:
Need to raise L3 once we get confirmation from customer on: 
 
She needs to try and pay from different browser (chrome / safari) Once the payment is resolved, we need to ask her test order for us to check. We have the backend access. 
 
 
Query 1: Customer has contacted us again stating that she is unable to subscribe to the plans, as it is displaying a blank page. The subscription ended on Feb 20 2026, they have not been able to renew. The payment subscription ID page is blank. Customer was on $49 monthly plan
 
 
Query 2: Customer mentioned that for orders shipped from Sweden to the US, when a discount is applied, the value printed on the CN22 customs form shows the total product value without the discount applied. For example, in Order No. 409569, the amount displayed reflects the full price instead of the discounted price. The customer expects the discounted value to be shown so that customs duties are calculated based on the actual amount paid.
 
The subtotal $58.75 and Grand total is $47 with discount applied, However the subtotal is printed on the form. Screenshots are attached.
 
 
URL - https://store-e639qazpfv.mybigcommerce.com
Account ID - eb5b4aa6-2e50-4429-8171-688c8c2e81d0 
 
Credentials : 
email: support@pluginhive.com
RL for logging in is the following, and store name is "CNS Watch Bands"
https://login.bigcommerce.com/

comments.body:
Hi Sofie,

I tried reaching you at +46 76 879 29 94, but the call was not answered. So I’m following up via email instead.

Regarding the difficulty in subscribing, could you please try subscribing using both Safari and Google Chrome browsers? Sometimes the blank page may appear due to browser-related concerns.

If the problem persists, kindly share a screenshot of the page you see so we can check this further from our end.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
L3:https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1773136691892979
 Plugin Loading issue for manage subscription page

Query 1: Customer has contacted us again stating that she is unable to subscribe to the plans, as it is displaying a blank page. The subscription ended on Feb 20 2026, they have not been able to renew. The payment subscription ID page is blank. Customer was on $49 monthly plan

Query 2: Customer mentioned that for orders shipped from Sweden to the US, when a discount is applied, the value printed on the CN22 customs form shows the total product value without the discount applied. For example, in Order No. 409569, the amount displayed reflects the full price instead of the discounted price. The customer expects the discounted value to be shown so that customs duties are calculated based on the actual amount paid.

The subtotal $58.75 and Grand total is $47 with discount applied, However the subtotal is printed on the form. Screenshots are attached.


URL - https://store-e639qazpfv.mybigcommerce.com
Account ID - eb5b4aa6-2e50-4429-8171-688c8c2e81d0

Credentials :
email: support@pluginhive.com
RL for logging in is the following, and store name is "CNS Watch Bands"
https://login.bigcommerce.com/

Query 1: Customer has contacted us again stating that she is unable to subscribe to the plans, as it is displaying a blank page. The subscription ended on Feb 20 2026, they have not been able to renew. The payment subscription ID page is blank. Customer was on $49 monthly plan
 
Query 2: Customer mentioned that for orders shipped from Sweden to the US, when a discount is applied, the value printed on the CN22 customs form shows the total product value without the discount applied. The subtotal $58.75 and Grand total is $47 with discount applied, However the subtotal is printed on the form. Screenshots are attached.

comments.body:
Hello Sofie,

Thank you for your patience.

Our team has now corrected the subscription page, and you should be able to access it and renew your plan normally. Please try again and let us know if everything works fine on your end.

Regarding the CN22 customs form, we checked the details and noticed that the subtotal value is currently printed instead of the discounted total. Our development team will be updating the app in a future release so that the discounted value will be printed on the customs document for PostNord shipments. We will keep you updated.

For your reference, please check the attached screenshot.

Please let us know if you have any questions. We’ll be happy to help.


 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/6JoPDsQ290wkje5XoIo3s1fgR/?name=Screenshot+2026-03-11+at+4.59.50%E2%80%AFPM.png)
Thanks and Regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Sofie,
 
Thank you for your patience.
 
Our team has now corrected the subscription page, and you should be able to access it and renew your plan normally. Please try again and let us know if everything works fine on your end.
 
Regarding the CN22 customs form, we checked the details and noticed that the subtotal value is currently printed instead of the discounted total. Our development team will be updating the app in a future release so that the discounted value will be printed on the customs document for PostNord shipments. We will keep you updated.
 
For your reference, please check the attached screenshot.
 
Please let us know if you have any questions. We’ll be happy to help.
 
 

Thanks and Regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Request #386284 "URGENT error - Declaration to US..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #386284:

Hi, It appears that the declaration to the US is still not working properly. This is now a very URGENT problem that needs to be fixed.

I have two different examples listed here:



First one is with an error with ordinary price on sale price + discount.

This is order number 413756   :

 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/rziEewCc5wMMqWZ3OWzU9hLnE/?name=image.png)

Products is 9.95 + 9.95 + 12.95, minus discount -4.92, plus 8.95 in shipping is total of 36.88



In multi carrier shipping label I get this information:

Products are 15.95 + 19.95 + 12.95 which is previous prices without ongoing sale. but it still states the accurate order total of 36.88.

 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/awaeLIiQlUBcDvAqhh64MhRV4/?name=image.png)



When I press print documents to create a label there is wrong information on the CN22, it states total order value to 48.85 instead of 27.39 (32.85 - 4.92) which is the actual order value.

We need to pay Tariffs on this amount so tat it is very important that it is correct.

 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/UhtsKttzTb5Vi1bua5qHn8Ev3/?name=image.png)





-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Second example, error with price import.



This is order number 413641:



 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/DSQZllmJotGBTZ5s64MBnlAqk/?name=image.png)

The Barracuda strap Navy in 18 mm is on sale for the moment and is now 3.95, previously is was 9.95.



In multi carrier shipping label I get this information:

Baracuda strap Navy 18mm is 15.95, and that is a price we have never used on this products, so that is a price import error or something.

 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/PSJXkTVpVO4iwjRvUMbDYAP8J/?name=image.png)



When I press print documents to create a label there is wrong information on the CN22, it states total order value to 23.90 instead of 11.90:



 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/77hAPhijNJiGfp8bvhtjBKFip/?name=image.png)





Vänliga hälsningar

Sofie Bitling

Hi, It appears that the declaration to the US is still not working properly. This is now a very URGENT problem that needs to be fixed.

First one is with an error with ordinary price on sale price + discount.

We need to pay Tariffs on this amount so tat it is very important that it is correct.

comments.body:
Hello Sofie Bitling,

Thank you for reaching out with your case.

We do understand your concern on this case.

Our team is already working on the enhancement to address your case and it has been prioritized for the upcoming release cycle.

The expected ETA for the enhancement is about 1 month time. However, we have requested our technical team to check for feasibility of an earlier release of the enhancement.

We will update you if anything changes.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
